---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Which client(s) should this affect?

- [ ] iOS / iPadOS (Swift)
- [ ] Web (TypeScript + Svelte)
- [ ] Android (Kotlin)
- [ ] Collaboration relay
- [ ] All / shared behavior

## Parity & compatibility

- Does this exist on excalidraw.com? If so, link it.
- Does it affect the `.excalidraw` format or the collaboration protocol? (These
  are shared cross-client contracts — changes flow through OpenSpec.)

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or anything else that helps.
